{{Navbox | name = Chinese Buddhist Pantheon | basestyle = | title = Chinese Buddhist pantheon | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | bodyclass = hlist | image = [[File:Guanyin 00.jpg|200px]] | group1 = [[Buddhahood|Buddhas]]
佛 (Fó)/如來 (Rúlái) | list1 = * [[Five Tathāgatas|Five Wisdom Tathāgatas (Wǔfāng Fó)]] * [[Buddhahood#The Seven Buddhas of Antiquity|Seven Buddhas of Antiquity (Guòqù Qīfó)]] * [[Buddhas of the Ten Directions (Shífāng Fó)]][[:zh:十方佛|[zh]]] * [[Eighty-eight Buddhas Great Repentance Text|Eighty-eight Buddhas (Bāshíbā Fó)]] * [[The Buddha|Śākyamuni (Shìjiāmóuní Fó)]] * [[Vairocana|Vairocana (Pílúzhēnǎ Fó)]] * [[Amitābha|Amitābha (Āmítuó Fó)]] * [[Bhaisajyaguru|Bhaisajyaguru (Yàoshī Fó)]] * [[Amoghasiddhi|Amoghasiddhi (Bùkōngchéngjiù Fó)]] * [[Akshobhya|Akshobhya (Āchù Fó)]] * [[Ratnasambhava|Ratnasambhava (Bǎoshēng Fó)]] * [[Dipankara|Dīpankara (Rándēng Fó)]] * [[Vipassī|Vipassī (Pípóshī Fó)]] * [[Vessabhū|Vessabhū (Píshèpó Fó)]] * [[Kakusandha|Kakusandha (Jūliúsūn Fó)]] * [[Koṇāgamana|Koṇāgamana (Jūnàhán Fó)]] * [[Kassapa Buddha|Kassapa (Jiāshè Fó)]] | group2 = [[Bodhisattva]]s
菩薩 (Púsà) | list2 = * [[Four Great Bodhisattvas (Sìdà Púsà)]][[:zh:四大菩萨)|[zh]]] * [[Eight Great Bodhisattvas (Bādà Púsà)]][[:zh:八大菩萨)|[zh]]] * [[Sutra of Perfect Enlightenment|Twelve Bodhisattvas of Perfect Enlightenment (Shí'èr Yuánjué Púsà)]] * [[Guanyin|Avalokiteśvara (Guānyīn Púsà)]] * [[Manjushri|Manjushri (Wénshū Púsà)]] * [[Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Samantabhadra (Pǔxián Púsà)]] * [[Kṣitigarbha|Kṣitigarbha (Dìzàng Púsà)]] * [[Mahasthamaprapta|Mahāsthāmaprāpta (Dàshìzhì Púsà)]] * [[Vajrapani|Vajrapāṇi (Jīngāngshǒu Púsà)]] * [[Maitreya|Maitreya (Mílè Púsa)]] * [[Ākāśagarbha|Ākāśagarbha (Xūkōngzàng Púsà)]] * [[Cundi (Buddhism)|Cundī (Zhǔntí Púsà)]] * [[Tara (Buddhism)|Tara (Duōluó Púsà)]] * [[Sūryaprabha|Sūryaprabha (Rìguāng Púsà)]] * [[Candraprabha|Candraprabha (Yuèguāng Púsà)]] * [[Bhaiṣajyarāja|Bhaiṣajyarāja (Yàowáng Púsà)]] * [[Bhaiṣajyasamudgata|Bhaiṣajyasamudgata (Yàoshàng Púsà)]] * [[Cintāmaṇicakra|Cintāmaṇicakra (Rúyìlún Guānyīn)]] * [[Vajrasattva|Vajrasattva (Jīngāng Sàduǒ Púsà)]] | group3 = [[Wisdom King]]s
明王 (Míngwáng) | list3 = * [[Wisdom King#The Eight Wisdom Kings|Eight Wisdom Kings (Bādà Míngwáng)]] * [[Wisdom King#The Ten Wisdom Kings|Ten Wisdom Kings (Shídà Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahamayuri|Mahamayuri (Kǒngquè Míngwáng)]] * [[Ucchusma|Ucchuṣma (Huìjì Jīngāng)]] * [[Kuṇḍali|Kuṇḍali (Jūntúlì Míngwáng)]] * [[Hayagriva (Buddhism)|Hayagriva (Mǎtóu Guānyīn)]] * [[Acala|Acala (Bùdòng Míngwáng)]] * [[Trailokyavijaya|Trailokyavijaya (Xiángsānshì Míngwáng)]] * [[Yamantaka|Yamāntaka (Dàwēidé Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahacakra|Mahacakra (Dàlún Míngwáng)]] * [[Padanaksipa|Padanaksipa (Bùzhì Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahabala|Mahabala (Dàlì Míngwáng)]] * [[Aparajita (Wisdom King)|Aparajita (Wúnéngshēng Míngwáng)]] * [[Vajrahāsa|Vajrahāsa (Dàxiào Míngwáng)]] | group4 = [[Deity|Deities and Demons]]
諸天鬼神 (Zhūtiān Guǐshén) | list4 = * [[Twenty-Four Protective Deities|Twenty-Four Protective Deities (Èrshísì Zhūtiān)]] * [[Twelve Heavenly Generals|Twelve Heavenly Generals (Shí'èr Shénjiāng)]] * [[Eight Great Yakṣa Generals|Eight Great Yakṣa Generals (Bādà Yèchā Dàjiàng)]] * [[Eight Legions|Eight Legions of Devas and Nāgas (Tiānlóng bābù)]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings|Four Heavenly Kings (Sì Tiānwáng)]] * [[Brahmā (Buddhism)|Brahma (Fàntiān)]] * [[Śakra (Buddhism)|Indra (Dìshìtiān)]] * [[Shiva in Buddhism|Shiva (Dàzìzàitiān)]] * [[Kisshōten|Lakshmi (Gōngdétiān)]] * [[Benzaiten|Saraswati (Biàncáitiān)]] * [[Sūryaprabha|Surya (Rìtiān)]] * [[Candraprabha|Chandra (Yuètiān)]] * [[Pañcika|Pañcika (Sànzhī Dàjiàng)]] * [[Hariti|Hārītī (Guǐzǐmǔ)]] * [[Yama (Buddhism)|Yama (Yán Wáng)]] * [[Marici (Buddhism)|Marici (Mólìzhītiān)]] * [[Vasudhara|Prithvi (Jiānláo Dishén)]] * [[Sāgara (Dragon King)|Sāgara (Suōjiéluó Lóngwáng)]] *[[Nio (Buddhism)|Vajra-Weilding God (Zhíjīngāng shén)]] ** [[Nio (Buddhism)|Gunyapati (Mìjī Jīngāng)]] ** [[Nio (Buddhism)|Narayana (Nàluóyántiān)]] * [[Sitatapatra|Sitātapatrā (Báisǎngài Fúdǐng)]] * [[Mahakala|Mahākāla (Dàhēitiān)]] * [[Sudhana|Sudhana (Shàncái)]] * [[Longnü|Nagakanya (Lóngnǚ)]] * [[Puti Shushen]] * [[Ziwei Emperor]] * [[Dongyue Dadi|Dongyue Emperor (Dōngyuè Dàdì)]] * [[Leigong|Thunder god (Léigōng)]] * [[Skanda (Buddhism)|Skanda (Wéituó)]] * [[Guan Yu|Sangharama Bodhisattva (Qíelán Púsà)]] * [[Deva (Buddhism)|Deva (Tiān)]] * [[Nāga|Nāga (Lóng)]] * [[Asura|Asura (Āxiūluō)]] * [[Yaksha|Yaksha (Yèchà)]] * [[Garuda|Garuda (Jiālóuluó)]] * [[Gandharva|Gandharva (Gāntàpó)]] * [[Kinnara|Kinnara (Jǐnnàluō)]] * [[Mahoraga|Mahoraga (Móhóuluójiā)]] * [[Apsara|Apsara (Fēitiān Nǚshén)]] * [[Kalaviṅka|Kalaviṅka (Jiālíngpínqié)]] | group5 = [[Arhat]]s
羅漢 (Luóhàn) | list5 = * [[:zh-tw:五百罗汉|Five Hundred Arhats (Wǔbǎi luóhàn)]] * [[Eighteen Arhats|Eighteen Arhats (Shíbā Luóhàn)]] * [[Sixteen Arhats|Sixteen Arhats (Shíliù Luóhàn)]] * [[Mahākāśyapa|Mahākāśyapa (Xiánglóng Luóhàn)]] * [[Nagasena|Nagasena(Wāěr Luóhàn)]] * [[Rāhula|Rahula (Chénsāi Luóhàn)]] * [[Pindola Bharadvaja|Pindola Bharadvaja (Qílù Luóhàn)]] * [[Bodhidharma|Bodhidharma (Guojiāng Luóhàn)]] * [[Asita|Asita (Chángméi Luóhàn)]] * [[Kanaka the Vatsa|Kanaka the Vatsa (Xǐqìng Luóhàn)]] * [[Kanaka the Bharadvaja|Kanaka the Bharadvaja (Jǔbō Luóhàn)]] * [[Subinda|Subinda (Tuōda Luóhàn)]] * [[Nakula (arhat)|Nakula (Jìngzuò Luóhàn)]] * [[Kalika (arhat)|Kalika (Qíxiàng Luóhàn)]] * [[Vijraputra|Vijraputra (Xiàoshī Luóhàn)]] * [[Gobaka|Gobaka (Kāixīn Luóhàn)]] * [[Pantha the Elder|Pantha the Elder (Tànshǒu Luóhàn)]] * [[Vanavasa|Vanavasa (Bājiāo Luóhàn)]] * [[Pantha the Younger|Pantha the Younger (Kānmén Luóhàn)]] * [[Budai|Budai (Bùdài Luóhàn)]] | group6 = [[Sangha]]
高僧・祖師 (Gāosēng・Zǔshī) | list6 = * [[Ānanda]] * [[Maudgalyayana|Moggallāna]] * [[Bodhidharma|Bodhidharma (Dámó)]] * [[An Shigao]] * [[Xuanzang|Xuánzàng]] * [[Faxian|Fǎxiǎn]] * [[Yijing (monk)|Yìjìng]] * [[Shandao|Shàn Dào]] * [[Huiguo|Huìguǒ]] * [[Ji Gong|Jìgōng]] * [[Emperor Ming of Han|Emperor Ming]] * [[Emperor Wu of Liang|Emperor Wu]] | below = * [[Mahayana]] * [[Chan Buddhism|Chan]] * [[Pure Land Buddhism|Pure Land]] * [[Tiantai]] * [[Huayan]] * [[Chinese Esoteric Buddhism]] * [[Tantra|Tantrism]] * [[Chinese mythology]] * [[Religion in China]] }}{{documentation|content= {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Buddhism in China templates]] }}

明王 (Míngwáng) | list3 = * [[Wisdom King#The Eight Wisdom Kings|Eight Wisdom Kings (Bādà Míngwáng)]] * [[Wisdom King#The Ten Wisdom Kings|Ten Wisdom Kings (Shídà Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahamayuri|Mahamayuri (Kǒngquè Míngwáng)]] * [[Ucchusma|Ucchuṣma (Huìjì Jīngāng)]] * [[Kuṇḍali|Kuṇḍali (Jūntúlì Míngwáng)]] * [[Hayagriva (Buddhism)|Hayagriva (Mǎtóu Guānyīn)]] * [[Acala|Acala (Bùdòng Míngwáng)]] * [[Trailokyavijaya|Trailokyavijaya (Xiángsānshì Míngwáng)]] * [[Yamantaka|Yamāntaka (Dàwēidé Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahacakra|Mahacakra (Dàlún Míngwáng)]] * [[Padanaksipa|Padanaksipa (Bùzhì Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahabala|Mahabala (Dàlì Míngwáng)]] * [[Aparajita (Wisdom King)|Aparajita (Wúnéngshēng Míngwáng)]] * [[Vajrahāsa|Vajrahāsa (Dàxiào Míngwáng)]] | group4 = [[Deity|Deities and Demons]]

佛 (Fó)/如來 (Rúlái) | list1 = * [[Five Tathāgatas|Five Wisdom Tathāgatas (Wǔfāng Fó)]] * [[Buddhahood#The Seven Buddhas of Antiquity|Seven Buddhas of Antiquity (Guòqù Qīfó)]] * [[Buddhas of the Ten Directions (Shífāng Fó)]][[:zh:十方佛|[zh]]] * [[Eighty-eight Buddhas Great Repentance Text|Eighty-eight Buddhas (Bāshíbā Fó)]] * [[The Buddha|Shakyamuni (Shìjiāmóuní Fó)]] * [[Vairocana|Vairocana (Pílúzhēnǎ Fó)]] * [[Amitābha|Amitābha (Āmítuó Fó)]] * [[Bhaisajyaguru|Bhaisajyaguru (Yàoshī Fó)]] * [[Amoghasiddhi|Amoghasiddhi (Bùkōngchéngjiù Fó)]] * [[Akshobhya|Akshobhya (Āchù Fó)]] * [[Ratnasambhava|Ratnasambhava (Bǎoshēng Fó)]] * [[Dipankara|Dīpankara (Rándēng Fó)]] * [[Vipassī|Vipassī (Pípóshī Fó)]] * [[Vessabhū|Vessabhū (Píshèpó Fó)]] * [[Kakusandha|Kakusandha (Jūliúsūn Fó)]] * [[Koṇāgamana|Koṇāgamana (Jūnàhán Fó)]] * [[Kassapa Buddha|Kassapa (Jiāshè Fó)]] | group2 = [[Bodhisattva]]s
菩薩 (Púsà) | list2 = * [[Four Great Bodhisattvas (Sìdà Púsà)]][[:zh:四大菩萨)|[zh]]] * [[Eight Great Bodhisattvas (Bādà Púsà)]][[:zh:八大菩萨)|[zh]]] * [[Sutra of Perfect Enlightenment|Twelve Bodhisattvas of Perfect Enlightenment (Shí'èr Yuánjué Púsà)]] * [[Guanyin|Avalokiteśvara (Guānyīn Púsà)]] * [[Manjushri|Manjushri (Wénshū Púsà)]] * [[Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Samantabhadra (Pǔxián Púsà)]] * [[Kṣitigarbha|Kṣitigarbha (Dìzàng Púsà)]] * [[Mahasthamaprapta|Mahāsthāmaprāpta (Dàshìzhì Púsà)]] * [[Vajrapani|Vajrapāṇi (Jīngāngshǒu Púsà)]] * [[Maitreya|Maitreya (Mílè Púsa)]] * [[Ākāśagarbha|Ākāśagarbha (Xūkōngzàng Púsà)]] * [[Cundi (Buddhism)|Cundī (Zhǔntí Púsà)]] * [[Tara (Buddhism)|Tara (Duōluó Púsà)]] * [[Sūryaprabha|Sūryaprabha (Rìguāng Púsà)]] * [[Candraprabha|Candraprabha (Yuèguāng Púsà)]] * [[Bhaiṣajyarāja|Bhaiṣajyarāja (Yàowáng Púsà)]] * [[Bhaiṣajyasamudgata|Bhaiṣajyasamudgata (Yàoshàng Púsà)]] * [[Cintāmaṇicakra|Cintāmaṇicakra (Rúyìlún Guānyīn)]] * [[Vajrasattva|Vajrasattva (Jīngāng Sàduǒ Púsà)]] | group3 = [[Wisdom King]]s
明王 (Míngwáng) | list3 = * [[Wisdom King#The Eight Wisdom Kings|Eight Wisdom Kings (Bādà Míngwáng)]] * [[Wisdom King#The Ten Wisdom Kings|Ten Wisdom Kings (Shídà Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahamayuri|Mahamayuri (Kǒngquè Míngwáng)]] * [[Ucchusma|Ucchuṣma (Huìjì Jīngāng)]] * [[Kuṇḍali|Kuṇḍali (Jūntúlì Míngwáng)]] * [[Hayagriva (Buddhism)|Hayagriva (Mǎtóu Guānyīn)]] * [[Acala|Acala (Bùdòng Míngwáng)]] * [[Trailokyavijaya|Trailokyavijaya (Xiángsānshì Míngwáng)]] * [[Yamantaka|Yamāntaka (Dàwēidé Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahacakra|Mahacakra (Dàlún Míngwáng)]] * [[Padanaksipa|Padanaksipa (Bùzhì Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahabala|Mahabala (Dàlì Míngwáng)]] * [[Aparajita (Wisdom King)|Aparajita (Wúnéngshēng Míngwáng)]] * [[Vajrahāsa|Vajrahāsa (Dàxiào Míngwáng)]] | group4 = [[Kami|Deities and Demons]]
諸天鬼神 (Zhūtiān Guǐshén) | list4 = * [[Twenty-Four Protective Deities|Twenty-Four Protective Deities (Èrshísì Zhūtiān)]] * [[Twelve Heavenly Generals|Twelve Heavenly Generals (Shí'èr Shénjiāng)]] * [[Eight Great Yakṣa Generals|Eight Great Yakṣa Generals (Bādà Yèchā Dàjiàng)]] * [[Eight Legions|Eight Legions of Devas and Nāgas (Tiānlóng bābù)]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings|Four Heavenly Kings (Sì Tiānwáng)]] * [[Brahmā (Buddhism)|Brahma (Fàntiān)]] * [[Śakra (Buddhism)|Indra (Dìshìtiān)]] * [[Shiva in Buddhism|Shiva (Dàzìzàitiān)]] * [[Kisshōten|Lakshmi (Gōngdétiān)]] * [[Benzaiten|Saraswati (Biàncáitiān)]] * [[Sūryaprabha|Surya (Rìtiān)]] * [[Candraprabha|Chandra (Yuètiān)]] * [[Pañcika|Pañcika (Sànzhī Dàjiàng)]] * [[Hariti|Hārītī (Guǐzǐmǔ)]] * [[Yama (Buddhism)|Yama (Yán Wáng)]] * [[Marici (Buddhism)|Marici (Mólìzhītiān)]] * [[Vasudhara|Prithvi (Jiānláo Dishén)]] * [[Sāgara (Dragon King)|Sāgara (Suōjiéluó Lóngwáng)]] *[[Nio (Buddhism)|Vajra-Weilding God (Zhíjīngāng shén)]] ** [[Nio (Buddhism)|Gunyapati (Mìjī Jīngāng)]] ** [[Nio (Buddhism)|Narayana (Nàluóyántiān)]] * [[Sitatapatra|Sitātapatrā (Báisǎngài Fúdǐng)]] * [[Mahakala|Mahākāla (Dàhēitiān)]] * [[Sudhana|Sudhana (Shàncái)]] * [[Longnü|Nagakanya (Lóngnǚ)]] * [[Puti Shushen]] * [[Ziwei Emperor]] * [[Dongyue Dadi|Dongyue Emperor (Dōngyuè Dàdì)]] * [[Leigong|Thunder god (Léigōng)]] * [[Skanda (Buddhism)|Skanda (Wéituó)]] * [[Guan Yu|Sangharama Bodhisattva (Qíelán Púsà)]] * [[Deva (Buddhism)|Deva (Tiān)]] * [[Nāga|Nāga (Lóng)]] * [[Asura|Asura (Āxiūluō)]] * [[Yaksha|Yaksha (Yèchà)]] * [[Garuda|Garuda (Jiālóuluó)]] * [[Gandharva|Gandharva (Gāntàpó)]] * [[Kinnara|Kinnara (Jǐnnàluō)]] * [[Mahoraga|Mahoraga (Móhóuluójiā)]] * [[Apsara|Apsara (Fēitiān Nǚshén)]] * [[Kalaviṅka|Kalaviṅka (Jiālíngpínqié)]] | group5 = [[Arhat]]s
羅漢 (Luóhàn) | list5 = * [[:zh-tw:五百罗汉|Five Hundred Arhats (Wǔbǎi luóhàn)]] * [[Eighteen Arhats|Eighteen Arhats (Shíbā Luóhàn)]] * [[Sixteen Arhats|Sixteen Arhats (Shíliù Luóhàn)]] * [[Mahākāśyapa|Mahākāśyapa (Xiánglóng Luóhàn)]] * [[Nagasena|Nagasena(Wāěr Luóhàn)]] * [[Rāhula|Rahula (Chénsāi Luóhàn)]] * [[Pindola Bharadvaja|Pindola Bharadvaja (Qílù Luóhàn)]] * [[Bodhidharma|Bodhidharma (Guojiāng Luóhàn)]] * [[Asita|Asita (Chángméi Luóhàn)]] * [[Kanaka the Vatsa|Kanaka the Vatsa (Xǐqìng Luóhàn)]] * [[Kanaka the Bharadvaja|Kanaka the Bharadvaja (Jǔbō Luóhàn)]] * [[Subinda|Subinda (Tuōda Luóhàn)]] * [[Nakula (arhat)|Nakula (Jìngzuò Luóhàn)]] * [[Kalika (arhat)|Kalika (Qíxiàng Luóhàn)]] * [[Vijraputra|Vijraputra (Xiàoshī Luóhàn)]] * [[Gobaka|Gobaka (Kāixīn Luóhàn)]] * [[Pantha the Elder|Pantha the Elder (Tànshǒu Luóhàn)]] * [[Vanavasa|Vanavasa (Bājiāo Luóhàn)]] * [[Pantha the Younger|Pantha the Younger (Kānmén Luóhàn)]] * [[Budai|Budai (Bùdài Luóhàn)]] | group6 = [[Sangha]]
高僧・祖師 (Gāosēng・Zǔshī) | list6 = * [[Ānanda]] * [[Maudgalyayana|Moggallāna]] * [[Bodhidharma|Bodhidharma (Dámó)]] * [[An Shigao]] * [[Xuanzang|Xuánzàng]] * [[Faxian|Fǎxiǎn]] * [[Yijing (monk)|Yìjìng]] * [[Shandao|Shàn Dào]] * [[Huiguo|Huìguǒ]] * [[Ji Gong|Jìgōng]] * [[Emperor Ming of Han|Emperor Ming]] * [[Emperor Wu of Liang|Emperor Wu]] | below = * [[Mahayana]] * [[Chan Buddhism|Chan]] * [[Pure Land Buddhism|Pure Land]] * [[Tiantai]] * [[Huayan]] * [[Chinese Esoteric Buddhism]] * [[Tantra|Tantrism]] * [[Chinese mythology]] * [[Religion in China]] }}{{documentation|content= {{collapsible option}} }} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Buddhism in China templates]] }} \n

諸天鬼神 (Zhūtiān Guǐshén) | list4 = * [[Twenty-Four Protective Deities|Twenty-Four Protective Deities (Èrshísì Zhūtiān)]] * [[Twelve Heavenly Generals|Twelve Heavenly Generals (Shí'èr Shénjiāng)]] * [[:en:Eight Great Yakṣa Generals|Eight Great Yakṣa Generals (Bādà Yèchā Dàjiàng)]] * [[:en:Eight Legions|Eight Legions of Devas and Nāgas (Tiānlóng bābù)]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings|Four Heavenly Kings (Sì Tiānwáng)]] * [[:en:Brahmā (Buddhism)|Brahma (Fàntiān)]] * [[:en:Śakra (Buddhism)|Indra (Dìshìtiān)]] * [[Shiva in Buddhism|Shiva (Dàzìzàitiān)]] * [[Kisshōten|Lakshmi (Gōngdétiān)]] * [[Benzaiten|Saraswati (Biàncáitiān)]] * [[Sūryaprabha|Surya (Rìtiān)]] * [[:en:Candraprabha|Chandra (Yuètiān)]] * [[Pañcika|Pañcika (Sànzhī Dàjiàng)]] * [[:en:Hariti|Hārītī (Guǐzǐmǔ)]] * [[Yama (Buddhism)|Yama (Yán Wáng)]] * [[Marici (Buddhism)|Marici (Mólìzhītiān)]] * [[Vasudhara|Prithvi (Jiānláo Dishén)]] * [[Sāgara (Dragon King)|Sāgara (Suōjiéluó Lóngwáng)]] *[[Nio (Buddhism)|Vajra-Weilding God (Zhíjīngāng shén)]] ** [[Nio (Buddhism)|Gunyapati (Mìjī Jīngāng)]] ** [[Nio (Buddhism)|Narayana (Nàluóyántiān)]] * [[Sitatapatra|Sitātapatrā (Báisǎngài Fúdǐng)]] * [[Mahakala|Mahākāla (Dàhēitiān)]] * [[Sudhana|Sudhana (Shàncái)]] * [[Longnü|Nagakanya (Lóngnǚ)]] * [[Puti Shushen]] * [[Ziwei Emperor]] * [[:en:Dongyue Dadi|Dongyue Emperor (Dōngyuè Dàdì)]] * [[Leigong|Thunder god (Léigōng)]] * [[Skanda (Buddhism)|Skanda (Wéituó)]] * [[:en:Guan Yu|Sangharama Bodhisattva (Qíelán Púsà)]] * [[:en:Deva (Buddhism)|Deva (Tiān)]] * [[Nāga|Nāga (Lóng)]] * [[:en:Asura|Asura (Āxiūluō)]] * [[Yaksha|Yaksha (Yèchà)]] * [[:en:Garuda|Garuda (Jiālóuluó)]] * [[:en:Gandharva|Gandharva (Gāntàpó)]] * [[Kinnara|Kinnara (Jǐnnàluō)]] * [[Mahoraga|Mahoraga (Móhóuluójiā)]] * [[:en:Apsara|Apsara (Fēitiān Nǚshén)]] * [[Kalaviṅka|Kalaviṅka (Jiālíngpínqié)]] | group5 = [[:en:Arhat|Arhat]]s
羅漢 (Luóhàn) | list5 = * [[:zh-tw:五百罗汉|Five Hundred Arhats (Wǔbǎi luóhàn)]] * [[:en:Eighteen Arhats|Eighteen Arhats (Shíbā Luóhàn)]] * [[Sixteen Arhats|Sixteen Arhats (Shíliù Luóhàn)]] * [[Mahākāśyapa|Mahākāśyapa (Xiánglóng Luóhàn)]] * [[Nagasena|Nagasena(Wāěr Luóhàn)]] * [[Rāhula|Rahula (Chénsāi Luóhàn)]] * [[Pindola Bharadvaja|Pindola Bharadvaja (Qílù Luóhàn)]] * [[:en:Bodhidharma|Bodhidharma (Guojiāng Luóhàn)]] * [[:en:Asita|Asita (Chángméi Luóhàn)]] * [[Kanaka the Vatsa|Kanaka the Vatsa (Xǐqìng Luóhàn)]] * [[Kanaka the Bharadvaja|Kanaka the Bharadvaja (Jǔbō Luóhàn)]] * [[Subinda|Subinda (Tuōda Luóhàn)]] * [[Nakula (arhat)|Nakula (Jìngzuò Luóhàn)]] * [[Kalika (arhat)|Kalika (Qíxiàng Luóhàn)]] * [[Vijraputra|Vijraputra (Xiàoshī Luóhàn)]] * [[Gobaka|Gobaka (Kāixīn Luóhàn)]] * [[Pantha the Elder|Pantha the Elder (Tànshǒu Luóhàn)]] * [[Vanavasa|Vanavasa (Bājiāo Luóhàn)]] * [[Pantha the Younger|Pantha the Younger (Kānmén Luóhàn)]] * [[:en:Budai|Budai (Bùdài Luóhàn)]] | group6 = [[Sangha]]

菩薩 (Púsà) | list2 = * [[Four Great Bodhisattvas (Sìdà Púsà)]][[:zh:四大菩萨)|[zh]]] * [[Eight Great Bodhisattvas (Bādà Púsà)]][[:zh:八大菩萨)|[zh]]] * [[:en:Sutra of Perfect Enlightenment|Twelve Bodhisattvas of Perfect Enlightenment (Shí'èr Yuánjué Púsà)]] * [[Kannon|Avalokiteśvara (Guānyīn Púsà)]] * [[Manjushri|Manjushri (Wénshū Púsà)]] * [[:en:Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Samantabhadra (Pǔxián Púsà)]] * [[:en:Kṣitigarbha|Kṣitigarbha (Dìzàng Púsà)]] * [[:en:Mahasthamaprapta|Mahāsthāmaprāpta (Dàshìzhì Púsà)]] * [[:en:Vajrapani|Vajrapāṇi (Jīngāngshǒu Púsà)]] * [[Maitreya|Maitreya (Mílè Púsa)]] * [[:en:Ākāśagarbha|Ākāśagarbha (Xūkōngzàng Púsà)]] * [[:en:Cundi (Buddhism)|Cundī (Zhǔntí Púsà)]] * [[:en:Tara (Buddhism)|Tara (Duōluó Púsà)]] * [[:en:Sūryaprabha|Sūryaprabha (Rìguāng Púsà)]] * [[:en:Candraprabha|Candraprabha (Yuèguāng Púsà)]] * [[:en:Bhaiṣajyarāja|Bhaiṣajyarāja (Yàowáng Púsà)]] * [[:en:Bhaiṣajyasamudgata|Bhaiṣajyasamudgata (Yàoshàng Púsà)]] * [[Cintāmaṇicakra|Cintāmaṇicakra (Rúyìlún Guānyīn)]] * [[:en:Vajrasattva|Vajrasattva (Jīngāng Sàduǒ Púsà)]] | group3 = [[Wisdom King]]s
明王 (Míngwáng) | list3 = * [[Wisdom King#The Eight Wisdom Kings|Eight Wisdom Kings (Bādà Míngwáng)]] * [[Wisdom King#The Ten Wisdom Kings|Ten Wisdom Kings (Shídà Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahamayuri|Mahamayuri (Kǒngquè Míngwáng)]] * [[:en:Ucchusma|Ucchuṣma (Huìjì Jīngāng)]] * [[:en:Kuṇḍali|Kuṇḍali (Jūntúlì Míngwáng)]] * [[:en:Hayagriva (Buddhism)|Hayagriva (Mǎtóu Guānyīn)]] * [[Acala|Acala (Bùdòng Míngwáng)]] * [[:en:Trailokyavijaya|Trailokyavijaya (Xiángsānshì Míngwáng)]] * [[:en:Yamantaka|Yamāntaka (Dàwēidé Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahacakra|Mahacakra (Dàlún Míngwáng)]] * [[Padanaksipa|Padanaksipa (Bùzhì Míngwáng)]] * [[Mahabala|Mahabala (Dàlì Míngwáng)]] * [[Aparajita (Wisdom King)|Aparajita (Wúnéngshēng Míngwáng)]] * [[Vajrahāsa|Vajrahāsa (Dàxiào Míngwáng)]] | group4 = [[Kami|Deities and Demons]]
